title: David and Goliath
summary: A young shepherd defeats a giant warrior with faith in God.
lesson: With faith, even the biggest challenges can be overcome.

title: Daniel in the Lion's Den
summary: Daniel is thrown into a den of lions for praying to God, but God protects him.
lesson: Stay faithful even when it is difficult.

title: Joseph and His Dreams
summary: Joseph is betrayed by his brothers but later rises to power in Egypt.
lesson: God can turn bad situations into good.

title: Moses and the Red Sea
summary: God parts the Red Sea to save the Israelites from Pharaoh.
lesson: God makes a way where there seems to be no way.

title: The Good Samaritan
summary: A man helps a stranger who was ignored by others.
lesson: Love and help others regardless of differences.

title: Jesus Feeds the 5000
summary: Jesus multiplies five loaves and two fish to feed thousands.
lesson: God can multiply what little you have.

title: Noah's Ark
summary: Noah builds an ark and saves his family and animals from the flood.
lesson: Obey God even when it doesn't make sense.

title: The Prodigal Son
summary: A son leaves home, wastes everything, but is welcomed back by his father.
lesson: God always welcomes us back with love.

title: Peter Walks on Water
summary: Peter walks on water toward Jesus but begins to sink when he doubts.
lesson: Keep your focus on God, not your fears.

title: The Birth of Jesus
summary: Jesus is born in Bethlehem as the Savior of the world.
lesson: God's promises are always fulfilled.

title: Joshua and the Walls of Jericho
summary: The Israelites obey God's unusual instruction and the walls of Jericho fall.
lesson: Obedience to God brings victory, even when it doesn't make sense.

title: Elijah and the Widow
summary: A widow's small amount of food never runs out after she obeys God.
lesson: God provides when we trust Him with what we have.

title: Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego
summary: Three men refuse to worship an idol and are thrown into fire, but God saves them.
lesson: Stand firm in your faith no matter the pressure.

title: The Woman with the Issue of Blood
summary: A woman is healed after touching Jesus' garment in faith.
lesson: Faith can bring healing and breakthrough.

title: Jesus Calms the Storm
summary: Jesus calms a storm while His disciples are afraid.
lesson: God brings peace in the middle of chaos.

title: The Lost Sheep
summary: A shepherd leaves 99 sheep to find the one that is lost.
lesson: You are valuable and God seeks you out.

title: The Wise and Foolish Builders
summary: One man builds on rock and another on sand; only one stands strong.
lesson: Build your life on strong foundations.

title: Paul and Silas in Prison
summary: They worship God in prison and are miraculously freed.
lesson: Praise God even in difficult situations.

title: The Rich Young Ruler
summary: A man struggles to give up his wealth to follow Jesus.
lesson: Do not let possessions control your heart.

title: The Ten Lepers
summary: Jesus heals ten lepers, but only one returns to thank Him.
lesson: Always be grateful.

title: Jesus and the Samaritan Woman
summary: Jesus speaks to a woman and offers her living water.
lesson: God's love is for everyone.

title: The Parable of the Talents
summary: Servants are rewarded based on how they use what they were given.
lesson: Use your gifts wisely.

title: The Crucifixion of Jesus
summary: Jesus sacrifices His life for humanity.
lesson: True love involves sacrifice.

title: The Resurrection of Jesus
summary: Jesus rises from the dead, defeating death.
lesson: There is always hope and new life in God.

title: Abraham's Faith
summary: Abraham trusts God's promise even when it seems impossible.
lesson: Trust God even when you don't see the full picture.
